textPlain: This is a small personal project I built for myself during long sessions of focused work.I wanted something quieter than playlists — full ambient albums, minimal UI, no recommendations or feeds.It’s intentionally simple and opinionated. Feedback is welcome.
Nice! I normally just listen to a Tony Anderson album on repeat :)
Great domain name. Great site. Bookmarked immediately and shared.
I really miss Warren Ellis's Spekremodule ambient music podcast. Thanks for sharing.
favourited. this is exactly the kind of thing i love.
